title: VAJRA 2047: The Centennial Doctrine
summary: India's transition from a regional balancer to a global pole. GDP goal of $30T by 2047.
scenario: India in 2026 stands at $4.5 Trillion USD—the 4th largest economy on Earth, projected to cross $10T by 2035. Mission VAJRA 2047 replaces 'Strategic Autonomy' with 'Strategic Dominance'. Target: 98.4% Decision Authority Index.

title: The Indian Lake Doctrine: Maritime Supremacy
summary: Converting the Indian Ocean into an 'Indian Lake' through chokepoint control.
scenario: Indian Navy operates 150+ warships. INS Vikrant and INS Vikramaditya are active. Goal: Control Malacca, Hormuz, and Bab-el-Mandeb. Target: 5 Aircraft Carriers by 2047.
keywords: warships, aircraft carrier, indian lake, malacca, vikrant

title: Air Dominance: The 30-Squadron Crisis
summary: IAF squadron deficit: 30 active vs 42 sanctioned.
scenario: IAF strength is at 30 squadrons representing a 28% deficit. Su-30MKI (15SQ), Rafale (2SQ), Tejas (2SQ) are key assets. Fix: Tejas Mk2 (+4 SQ by 2030), AMCA 6th Gen.
keywords: IAF, squadron, tejas, rafale, amca, 30 squadrons

title: Hypersonic Overmatch: First-Strike Certainty
summary: Adoption of 'First-Strike Certainty' with Agni-VI-H Hypersonic missiles.
scenario: Agni-VI-H at Mach 12+ makes every existing missile shield (Patriot, S-400, THAAD) obsolete. Indian nuclear triad status: Land (100%), Sea (85%), Air (90%).
keywords: hypersonic, mach 12, agni-vi-h, first-strike, nuclear triad

title: Digital Sovereignty: The Big Lie
summary: Assessment of India's digital infrastructure as 100% US-controlled.
scenario: India's digital backbone (AWS, Azure, Android, Chips) is owned by US corporations. Sovereignty scores: Cloud (3%), AI (1%), Chips (5%). Target: BharatCloud (70% sovereign).
keywords: digital sovereignty, cloud, aws, chips, bharatcloud, android

title: Unfinished Business: The Critical Gaps
summary: Summary of critical vulnerabilities: Engines, Chips, and Squadron deficits.
scenario: Kaveri Engine (83kN dry) needs to reach 110kN. IAF 12 SQ gap requires 24 aircraft/year production. Carrier expansion to 5 requires mastering naval reactors.
keywords: kaveri, engine, semiconductors, squadron gap, carrier
